title: paspalum geniculatum
intro: Paspalum geniculatum, also known as Paspalidium geminatum, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Paspalum geniculatum include relief from fever, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy by infusing its leaves in hot water or by making a decoction to create a tea for consumption.
